title: Prevent prop spam before entity creation
prompt:
In server-side sandbox Garry's Mod Lua, allow each player at most 10 prop-spawn attempts per one-second fixed window. Deny over-budget props before the entity is created, preserve other addons' spawn hooks when allowed, and clean per-player state on disconnect. Show the complete hooks.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: PlayerSpawnProp fixed-window state keyed by player, return false only when denied, and PlayerDisconnected cleanup
